gift_card_types.name: Restaurant Dining Gift Card
gift_card_types.description: Digital or physical gift card redeemable for food and beverages at the hotel restaurant and bar.

gift_card_types.name: Hotel Stay Credit
gift_card_types.description: Credit applied toward room nights, taxes, and incidentals during a hotel stay.

gift_card_types.name: Spa Indulgence Gift Card
gift_card_types.description: Perfect for massages, facials, and spa treatments at the hotel spa.

gift_card_types.name: Hotel Experience Gift Card
gift_card_types.description: Flexible credit redeemable across rooms, restaurant, bar, and spa services.

meeting_amenities.name: LCD Projector
meeting_amenities.description: Ceiling-mounted LCD projector with HDMI and wireless presentation support.

meeting_amenities.name: Projection Screen
meeting_amenities.description: Pull-down projection screen sized appropriately for the meeting room.

meeting_amenities.name: Coffee Break Service
meeting_amenities.description: Freshly brewed coffee, tea, and water with a selection of light pastries.

meeting_amenities.name: High-Speed Wi-Fi
meeting_amenities.description: Dedicated high-speed wireless internet access for all attendees.

meeting_amenities.name: Sound System & Microphones
meeting_amenities.description: In-room speakers with wireless handheld microphone for presentations.

meeting_amenities.name: Flip Chart & Markers
meeting_amenities.description: Flip chart easel with paper pads and assorted color markers.

menu_items.name: Heirloom Tomato & Burrata Salad
menu_items.description: Local heirloom tomatoes, creamy burrata, basil pesto, and aged balsamic.

menu_items.name: Soup du Jour
menu_items.description: Chef’s daily soup, often featuring seasonal vegetables and house-made stock.

menu_items.name: Charred Mediterranean Octopus
menu_items.description: Grilled octopus with smoked paprika aioli, fingerling potatoes, and olives.

menu_items.name: Charred Cauliflower Bites
menu_items.description: Roasted cauliflower with tahini, pomegranate, and toasted almonds.

menu_items.name: Wild Mushroom Risotto
menu_items.description: Creamy arborio rice with mixed wild mushrooms, parmesan, and thyme.

menu_items.name: Baked Eggplant Parmigiana
menu_items.description: Layered eggplant, basil marinara, mozzarella, and parmesan with herb crumbs.

menu_items.name: Black Truffle Pappardelle
menu_items.description: Fresh pappardelle pasta with black truffle butter, mascarpone, and chives.

menu_items.name: Grilled Sea Bass
menu_items.description: Pan-seared sea bass with saffron risotto and fennel salad.

menu_items.name: Herb-Roasted Chicken
menu_items.description: Free-range chicken with roasted garlic jus, baby carrots, and potato purée.

menu_items.name: Bistro Steak Frites
menu_items.description: Grilled hanger steak, herb butter, and hand-cut fries.

menu_items.name: Dark Chocolate Torte
menu_items.description: Flourless dark chocolate torte with raspberry coulis and vanilla crème fraîche.

menu_items.name: Meyer Lemon Tart
menu_items.description: Meyer lemon custard in a buttery crust with brûléed meringue.

menu_items.name: Artisanal Cheese Selection
menu_items.description: Local and imported cheeses with seasonal accompaniments.

menu_items.name: Truffle Parmesan Fries
menu_items.description: Crispy fries tossed with truffle oil, parmesan, and herbs.

menu_items.name: Seasonal Greens
menu_items.description: Sautéed market greens with garlic and lemon.

menu_items.name: Aperol Spritz
menu_items.description: Aperol, prosecco, and soda water over ice with an orange slice.

menu_items.name: Sparkling Mineral Water
menu_items.description: 750ml bottle of chilled sparkling mineral water.

offers.name: Three-Night Spa Escape Package
offers.description: Unwind with daily spa access, one 60-minute massage per guest, late checkout, and daily breakfast for two.

offers.name: Urban Wellness Retreat
offers.description: Two-night stay including spa access, yoga class, late checkout, and healthy breakfast each morning.

offers.name: Spa Saver Weeknights
offers.description: Midweek spa package with access to hydrotherapy circuit, late checkout, and a glass of prosecco on arrival.

offers.name: Ultra-Luxury Spa Suite Experience
offers.description: Our most indulgent spa suite with private sauna, unlimited spa access, late checkout, and nightly tasting menu.

offers.name: Romance in the City
offers.description: Champagne on arrival, rose petal turndown, late checkout, and breakfast in bed.

offers.name: Weekday Business Saver
offers.description: Special rate for Sunday–Thursday stays including Wi-Fi and early check-in, ideal for business travelers.

offers.name: Chef’s Seasonal Tasting Dinner
offers.description: Five-course seasonal tasting menu with optional wine pairings in the restaurant.

offers.name: Family City Getaway
offers.description: Complimentary breakfast for the family, late checkout, and a welcome amenity for children.

offers.name: Spa Day & Dine
offers.description: Day access to spa facilities combined with a three-course dinner in the restaurant.

rooms.name: Cozy Single Room - City View
rooms.description: Compact yet comfortable room ideal for solo travelers, with a plush single bed and dedicated workspace.

rooms.name: Business Queen Room - City View
rooms.description: Bright city-view room with queen bed, ergonomic desk, and high-speed Wi-Fi for business stays.

rooms.name: Executive King Room - City View
rooms.description: Spacious king room with panoramic city views, lounge chair, and generous workstation.

rooms.name: Garden Compact Double
rooms.description: Cozy double room overlooking the inner garden, with breakfast included and a writing desk.

rooms.name: Garden Courtyard Queen
rooms.description: Serene garden-facing room with queen bed, French balcony, and daily breakfast included.

rooms.name: Garden Suite King
rooms.description: Elegant suite with separate sitting area, king bed, tranquil garden views, spa access, and breakfast.

rooms.name: Courtyard King Spa Room
rooms.description: Room with inner courtyard view, king bed, partial spa access, and rain shower.

rooms.name: Loft King Suite with Sofa Bed
rooms.description: Open-plan loft suite with king bed, sofa bed, city skyline views, and separate lounge area.

rooms.name: Family Double Room - Courtyard
rooms.description: Family-friendly room with two double beds and quiet courtyard views.

rooms.name: Terrace Queen Room - Ocean View
rooms.description: Stylish queen room with private terrace and sweeping ocean views.

rooms.name: Pool View King Room
rooms.description: Relaxed king room overlooking the outdoor pool, with easy access to terrace loungers.

rate_plans.name: Advance Purchase - Room Only
rate_plans.description: Save 10% with full prepayment. No changes or refunds.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Non-refundable. Full prepayment required at booking; no changes or cancellations allowed.

rate_plans.name: Flexible Rate with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Best available flexible rate including continental breakfast.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before arrival. One night charged for late cancellation or no-show.

rate_plans.name: Business Saver - Room Only
rate_plans.description: Discounted weekday rate for business travelers, room only.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Non-refundable rate. Date changes not permitted.

rate_plans.name: Business Rate with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Includes daily buffet breakfast and high-speed Wi-Fi.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 24 hours before arrival without charge. One night penalty thereafter.

rate_plans.name: Advance Purchase - Executive King
rate_plans.description: Save on your stay when you book and pay in advance. Room only.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Non-refundable after booking. Full prepayment required.

rate_plans.name: Executive King - Flexible with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Spacious executive room including breakfast and flexible cancellation.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation until 18:00 two days before arrival. One night fee for late cancellation.

rate_plans.name: Garden Compact - Room Only
rate_plans.description: Best available rate for a cozy garden-facing room, room only.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 24 hours before arrival without penalty.

rate_plans.name: Advance Purchase - Breakfast Included
rate_plans.description: Save with advance purchase. Includes daily breakfast for two.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Non-refundable. Full prepayment; no changes allowed.

rate_plans.name: Flexible Rate - Breakfast Included
rate_plans.description: Flexible cancellation with daily breakfast for two guests.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 18:00 one day prior to arrival to avoid a one-night fee.

rate_plans.name: Garden Courtyard Queen - Breakfast Included
rate_plans.description: Queen room overlooking the courtyard garden with daily breakfast.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation until 18:00 one day before arrival; one night charged thereafter.

rate_plans.name: Romance Courtyard - Breakfast & Late Checkout
rate_plans.description: Includes breakfast for two, welcome sweets, and late checkout at 2 PM.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 48 hours before arrival without fee.

rate_plans.name: Garden Suite Spa Retreat
rate_plans.description: Suite stay including spa access, breakfast for two, and 2 PM late checkout.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 3 days before arrival without charge. 50% of stay charged for late cancellation.

rate_plans.name: Garden Suite - Room Only
rate_plans.description: Spacious garden suite with spa access, room only.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 48 hours before arrival to avoid a one-night fee.

rate_plans.name: Courtyard King Spa - Breakfast & Spa Access
rate_plans.description: King spa room with courtyard view, including spa access and breakfast.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours prior to arrival.

rate_plans.name: Spa Escape Package Rate
rate_plans.description: Package rate aligned with Spa Escape offer, including spa access, breakfast, and late checkout.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Non-refundable within 7 days of arrival; 50% deposit required at booking.

rate_plans.name: Loft King Suite - Flexible with Breakfast
rate_plans.description: Loft suite with king bed and sofa bed, including breakfast and spa access.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 5 days before arrival for full refund; 50% of stay charged thereafter.

rate_plans.name: Family Courtyard - Breakfast Included
rate_plans.description: Rate for families including breakfast for up to two adults and two children.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 2 days before arrival; one night fee after that.

rate_plans.name: Ocean Terrace Romance
rate_plans.description: Romantic stay with ocean view, breakfast, welcome champagne, and late checkout at 2 PM.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Cancel up to 3 days before arrival for full refund.

rate_plans.name: Pool View King - Breakfast Included
rate_plans.description: King room overlooking the pool, including breakfast for two guests.
rate_plans.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation until 18:00 one day prior to arrival.

restaurant_reservations.specialRequests: Celebrating a birthday; a small candle on dessert if possible.
High chair needed for one toddler.
Blankets requested if it gets chilly.
Prefer a long table rather than two small tables.
Allergic to nuts; please advise on safe options.
